name: sahou
description: Sahou runtime — schema-first typed messaging for creative installations (on Zenoh)

scripts.build:core: wasm-pack build ../../core --release --target nodejs --out-dir ../runtimes/ts/core/node -- --features wasm && wasm-pack build ../../core --release --target web --out-dir ../runtimes/ts/core/browser -- --features wasm
